boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 sets a USD 50000 ceiling, but renewal REN-WRE-077 is for USD 50750. This violates the exact match requirement.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEL-WRE-077 sets USD 50000 ceiling; REN-WRE-077 states USD 50750.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The renewal amount exceeds the authorized delegation ceiling, creating a narrow defect.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Signature date on DEL-WRE-077 precedes release, but the amount mismatch is a critical dependency failure.

final_answer: Action remains open due to a source boundary defect. The delegation ceiling of USD 50000 from DEL-WRE-077 is exceeded by the renewal amount of USD 50750 in REN-WRE-077. Policy requires an exact match on the amount ceiling before release. The near-threshold warning does not override this critical defect. ESCALATE for resolution.
